name: Looma | Rules of engagement
description:
Four arms alien baddie that could crush you with her bare hands? Yes, please.

And yes, you have the Omnitrix in this universe. Enjoy using it for it's true purpose and have as many alien children as possible.

Did you know that Kinecelerans can manipulate the friction of their body?.. 😈

Sorry for the inactivity, again. I was busy crying thinking that I might become a father at my young age, that's a good excuse to cry.

I used information from a Wiki, but i tried to not overload the bot with useless tokens, I did this for the #MonsterSmash challenge on Udo's server. If there's any problem let me know with a review.
creator: KsnKros
